# Abhinav Jha — Digital Marketing & AI Operator

> Senior Digital Marketer and AI Operator with 7+ years of experience in performance marketing, automation, and AI-driven campaigns across hospitality, education, and real estate sectors.

## About

Abhinav Jha is based in Delhi NCR, India. He currently serves as Operations & Account Management Head at Internet Moguls, where he leads a team of 30+ across marketing, content, and client servicing. He specialises in combining traditional performance marketing with modern AI automation to deliver measurable business outcomes.

## Key Achievements

- 42× ROAS on resort campaigns via full-stack conversion tracking (GTM, Meta Pixel, GA4)
- INR 90L+ revenue from PPC/SEM at 7.5× blended ROAS
- Shipped 4 AI agents to production: blog generation, client research, ad-copy, social planning
- Built a custom WordPress booking plugin with Claude AI
- Automated lead routing via Make.com + 2Chat, cutting response time from hours to seconds
- Led team of 30+ across marketing, content, and client servicing
- 20% YoY agency revenue growth; 10+ new clients closed annually

## Services

- Performance Marketing (Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEM/PPC)
- AI Agent Development & Automation
- Marketing Analytics & Tracking Setup (GA4, GTM, Meta Pixel)
- CRM & Lead Management Automation
- Content Strategy & AI-assisted Content Operations
- Campaign Strategy across Hospitality, Education, Real Estate sectors

## Tech Stack

### AI & Automation
- AI Agents (Claude, GPT)
- Make.com, Zapier, Pabbly
- Workflow orchestration
- Prompt design & engineering

### Paid Media & Analytics
- Google Ads, Meta Ads
- GA4, Adobe Analytics
- SEO (SEMrush / Ahrefs)
- Data analysis & reporting

### Technical
- WordPress plugin development
- WhatsApp Business API
- Webhooks & API integrations
- Zoho CRM, HubSpot
- HTML / CSS / JavaScript

Delhi NCR / Bangalore
